channel.title: Monkey Mind on Compossible
channel.description: Recent content in Monkey Mind on Compossible

item.title: My God! You Lunatic!
item.description:
Another morning

I awake and shake

My tired head

Warm the old

Cold coffee

That’s when the panic hits me

‘My God!, you lunatic!

What have you done?

Look what you wrote!

Do you remember what you said?

You imagined it all! ‘

A dreadful waking fever dream

Curse these amygdalan frenzies

…Then it starts again

A sinking seeping sadness

Creeping in

That feeling of this world

Breaking

Like waves of the sea
